objects.query: SELECT Name FROM AttributeBasedAdjRule WHERE Name LIKE 'MCC-%' ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT StockKeepingUnit FROM Product2 WHERE StockKeepingUnit IN ('MCC-MBR-IND', 'MCC-MBR-FAM', 'MCC-GOLF-ACADEMY') ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC
SELECT Code FROM AttributeDefinition WHERE Code IN ('MCC-COURSE-ACCESS', 'MCC-SESSION-TYPE') ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Name, SellingModelType FROM ProductSellingModel WHERE (Name = 'Term Annual' AND SellingModelType = 'TermDefined') OR (Name = 'One-Time' AND SellingModelType = 'OneTime') ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Name, CurrencyIsoCode, ScheduleType FROM PriceAdjustmentSchedule WHERE ScheduleType = 'Attribute' ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Name FROM AttributeBasedAdjRule WHERE Name LIKE 'MCC-%' ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT AttributeBasedAdjRuleId, AttributeDefinitionId, BooleanValue, DateValue, DateTimeValue, DoubleValue, IntegerValue, Operator, ProductId, StringValue FROM AttributeAdjustmentCondition WHERE AttributeBasedAdjRule.Name LIKE 'MCC-%' ORDER BY AttributeBasedAdjRule.Name ASC, AttributeDefinition.Code ASC, Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC

SELECT AdjustmentType, AdjustmentValue, AttributeAdjConditionsHash, AttributeBasedAdjRuleId, AttributeCount, CurrencyIsoCode, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, PriceAdjustmentScheduleId, PricingTerm, PricingTermUnit, ProductId, ProductSellingModelId, ScheduleType, SellingModelType FROM AttributeBasedAdjustment WHERE AttributeBasedAdjRule.Name LIKE 'MCC-%' ORDER BY AttributeBasedAdjRule.Name ASC, Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC
